subject: Reminder: complete your HireOS interview for Analytics Engineer
body_text:
Hi Nina NoShow,

This is a reminder to start your HireOS interview for the Analytics Engineer role.

Interview link: http://localhost:3000/interview/804eab0c-5bfb-4e15-a14a-55ad2225681a?access=eyJpbnRlcnZpZXdfaWQiOiI4MDRlYWIwYy01YmZiLTRlMTUtYTE0YS01NWFkMjIyNTY4MWEiLCJub25jZSI6IjF2TEtkUjVFOFgya1pGbU8yN0FZZEhkbDFwdzBpTlA2IiwiaXNzdWVkX2F0IjoiMjAyNi0wNi0xMFQxNzo1MDoyNy4zOTE1NjkrMDA6MDAiLCJleHBpcmVzX2F0IjoiMjAyNi0wNi0xN1QxNzo1MDoyNy4zOTE1NjkrMDA6MDAifQ.4ed35325f79c59657b833ab09ec065ad26bea20e9bb27438f92a6c4c360e5c01

If you need more time or an accommodation, please reply to the recruiter.

Best,
HireOS AI Recruiting

metadata.reminder_reason: Candidate has not started the interview after the invite window elapsed.
